env:

import Notebook from '@site/src/components/wljs-notebook-react';

Spawns a grid of WL editors with an arbitrary objects inside
```mathematica
Grid[Table[x, {4}, {7}]]
```

<Notebook code="" name="living-d9edc">living-d9edc</Notebook>

## Options
*Temporary not supported*
